title: Double Hit limits opponent return attacks to one

card.rawText: Equipped creature can initiate battle twice during their turn. Your opponent can only return attack for 1 of these battles.

effect.value: Can return attack for only 1 of those battles

plan.title: Double Hit limits opponent return attacks to one
plan.summary: Equip Double Hit and verify the return-attack restriction effect is represented for the opponent across the two initiated battles.

notes: Equip Double Hit to player_1 primary creature; opponent can only return attack for one of the two battles.

steps: Inspect the active battle requirement effect.
Verify return attacks are limited by the Double Hit effect.

expectedAssertions.label: Return attack restriction route emitted evidence
Equipped creature has battle requirement effect

manualVerification: A full two-battle route should prove the opponent may return attack for only one Double Hit battle.
riskNotes: This fixture checks that the return-attack branch is not collapsed into a generic equip with no battle effect.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_014_double_hit-014-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
